SQUALL-REVOLVER.description: After 3 attacks, gain 2 [img]res://Squall/images/display/firepower_power_small.png[/img][gold]Firepower[/gold]. At the start of combat, [gold]Junction[/gold] 1 Guardian Force (GF).
SQUALL-REVOLVER.title: Revolver
SQUALL-LIONHEART.description: Gain [gold]Lionheart[/gold] finisher. After 3 attacks, gain 4 [img]res://Squall/images/display/firepower_power_small.png[/img][gold]Firepower[/gold]. At the start of combat, [gold]Junction[/gold] 1 Guardian Force (GF)
SQUALL-LIONHEART.title: Lionheart
SQUALL-LEVIATHAN_SCALE.description: Start combat with full [gold]Firepower[/gold]. You can now [gold[Junction[/gold] Leviathan at the start of combat.
SQUALL-LEVIATHAN_SCALE.title: Leviathan Scale
SQUALL-MAGIC_LAMP.description: Gain 5 [gold]Crisis[/gold] at the start of every turn. You can now [gold]Junction[/gold] Diabolos at the start of combat.
SQUALL-MAGIC_LAMP.title: Magic Lamp
SQUALL-SOLOMON_RING.description: Your [gold]Summoned[/gold] GFs and the Magic added by [gold]Draw[/gold] are [gold]Upgraded[/gold].

SQUALL-HYPERION.description: Marked enemies take [gold]75%[/gold] more damage instead of 50%.
